productDisplayName: Puma Men Brown Terrae Mid Africa Shoes
description: Style NoteThe simple design and durable construction of these puma Terrae Mid Africa shoes in leather are typical of the brands minimalistic designs. The leather upper provides instant style and durability, cushioned midsoles give comfort and stability and rubber outsoles guarantee maximum traction. Perfect for urban life.Product DetailsBrown mid- top shoe with central lace-ups, nbsp;overlays, stitched detailing and reinforced overlay at the heel counterBranding on the medial side of the heelnbsp;Padded tongue and innerThick wooden style midsoleTPU outsole with irregular nubs and an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
